# Prateek Konduru

> AI Solutions Leader based in San Jose, CA. Manager of AI Solution Acceleration & Forward Deployment at Ushur, taking agentic AI, LLMs, and RAG systems from discovery to production for Fortune 500 insurance, healthcare, and financial services enterprises. Open to AI leadership roles.

Key facts:

- Current role: Manager, AI Solution Acceleration & Forward Deployment at Ushur (Dec 2025 - present); four promotions at Ushur since Oct 2023
- Track record: 60% lift in process automation, 85% reduction in manual intervention, $750K/year operational savings from reusable AI accelerators, team of 5 forward-deployed engineers across a $10M+ portfolio, 98% CSAT
- Current focus: agentic AI in enterprise production (multi-agent systems, MCP, tool calling, LangGraph, LLM evals, guardrails)
- Earlier roles: Graduate Technical Consultant at Miller Center for Social Entrepreneurship (2021-2023); Solutions Engineer at Oracle (2019-2021); internships at EFI and Zendesk
- Education: M.S. Computer Science & Engineering, Santa Clara University (2023); B.Tech Computer Engineering, PES University (2019)
- Certifications: AWS Certified Developer, Google Professional Machine Learning Engineer, Oracle Solutions Architect Associate, Oracle Autonomous Database Specialist
- Contact: pkonduru4@gmail.com
